# Flask Official Documentation Map

Use these official Flask documentation pages as the first source when implementing or reviewing Flask code.

## Primary Entry
- https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/

## Architecture and Lifecycle
- Application Factories:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/patterns/appfactories/
- Blueprints:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/blueprints/
- Application Structure and Lifecycle:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/lifecycle/

## Configuration and Runtime
- Configuration Handling:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/config/
- Command Line Interface:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/cli/
- Deploying to Production:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/deploying/

## Reliability and Observability
- Handling Application Errors:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/errorhandling/
- Logging:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/logging/
- Debugging Application Errors:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/debugging/

## Testing and Security
- Testing Flask Applications:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/testing/
- Security Considerations:
  https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/web-security/

## Usage Rule
For any non-trivial Flask recommendation, cite at least one relevant URL from this map in the final answer.
